scene: A sacrifice yields a malformed liver before a major convoy sails. The captains await your reading.

choices.label: Declare the omen ill - delay the sailing
choices.resultText: The convoy waits a day, cursing. A squall passes through that night. Cursing stops.

choices.label: Read it favorably - trade cannot wait
choices.resultText: The ships sail. You watch the horizon more than usual this week.

scene: A merchant of dubious reputation offers a massive donation to the temple - and expects public blessing.

choices.label: Accept and bless him
choices.resultText: The temple roof gets repaired. The whispers get louder.

choices.label: The goddess is not for purchase
choices.resultText: He storms out. The story of the refusal is worth more than his silver.

scene: A Gaulish mother carries her fevered child to the temple steps, barred by custom from entering.

choices.label: Treat the child on the steps yourself
choices.resultText: Greek physic, a Gaulish herb she presses on you, and a fever that breaks by dawn.

choices.label: Send her to the healers' quarter, as custom demands
choices.resultText: Custom upheld. Her look as she turned away is hard to put down.

scene: You are handed the organizing of this year's Artemisia. The budget is thin; expectations are not.

choices.label: Borrow against next year for a lavish festival
choices.resultText: Torches to the waterline. The city talks of nothing else for a month.

choices.label: An austere, perfectly correct rite
choices.resultText: No spectacle, no debt, no error. The old priests approve, loudly.

scene: A drunk young noble of a powerful House urinated against the temple wall at night. There were witnesses.

choices.label: Demand public penance regardless of his House
choices.resultText: He kneels on the steps with shorn hair. His House notes your name twice: once in anger, once in respect.

choices.label: Settle it privately for a temple donation
choices.resultText: The wall gets a new fresco. The witnesses get tired of waiting for justice.

scene: The mother temple in Ephesos invites a Massaliote delegate for the great rites. The journey is long and costly.

choices.label: Make the pilgrimage
choices.resultText: Ephesos at festival. Some things are worth every obol and every league.

choices.label: Send a junior priest with your blessing
choices.resultText: He returns transformed and loyal. You remain where the politics are.

scene: The temple's healing herbs run low. The best replacements grow in groves the Gauls tend - and guard.

choices.label: Ask the grove-keepers respectfully
choices.resultText: They share, amused that a Greek priest finally asked instead of took.

choices.label: Buy inferior stock from the market
choices.resultText: It serves. Barely. The sick heal slower this season.

scene: A mystery cult from the East gains followers in the lower city, drawing worshippers from your altars.

choices.label: Denounce it from the temple steps
choices.resultText: Attendance recovers. The cult goes quieter, not smaller.

choices.label: Attend one of their rites in plain dress
choices.resultText: Know the rival. Their rites borrow more from Artemis than they admit - useful.

scene: A white deer - sacred to Artemis - is seen in the chora. Hunters are already boasting about who will take it.

choices.label: Declare it protected on pain of curse
choices.resultText: No arrow flies. The deer is seen at dusk for years, always just out of reach, exactly as it should be.

choices.label: Organize a sanctioned ritual hunt
choices.resultText: The hunt is magnificent and the feast richer. Some old women make signs against you in the street.

scene: Drought grips the chora. The city demands intercession; the farmers demand results.

choices.label: Lead a great rain rite, all altars burning
choices.resultText: Nine days later, rain. Your standing rises with the river.

choices.label: Pray - and quietly organize water rationing
choices.resultText: The gods help those who dig cisterns. The harvest survives on both.
